name: No Cook Blueberry Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the prepared fruit into a large bowl.
2. Add sugar to the fruit and mix well.
3. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in Certo Liquid Fruit Pectin and lemon juice.
5. Continue stirring for 3 minutes until most of the sugar is dissolved.
6. Pour into clean jars or plastic containers and cover tightly with lids.
7. Let stand at room temperature until set, up to 24 hours.
8. Store in the freezer or up to 3 weeks in the refrigerator. Makes 7 cups.
